info.name: Job Portal Backend API
info.description:
Backend API for the Sri Lanka Rural Job Opportunity Platform.

Base URL: `http://localhost:5000`

Authentication: Pass JWT token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

Roles: `JOB_SEEKER`, `EMPLOYER`, `ADMIN`.

item.name: Health
item.description: Server health check. No authentication required.

request.description: Returns server uptime and timestamp.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Register, login, and get current user profile.

request.description: Create a job seeker account. Returns user profile and JWT token. Email must be unique. Password minimum 8 characters.
Create an employer account. Employers can post jobs, manage company profiles, and review applications.
Authenticate with email and password. Returns a JWT token valid for 1 hour. Token is auto-saved to the collection variable.
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user. Requires token.

item.name: Jobs
item.description: Job listings. Public users can browse. Employers can create, update, and delete their own jobs. Supports geolocation-based nearby search.

request.description: Get paginated list of all jobs. Public endpoint, no auth required.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Search jobs with optional filters. All query parameters are optional and can be combined.
Find jobs within a geographic radius. Only returns jobs that have location coordinates. Use POST /geo/geocode to convert place names to coordinates first.

response.name: 200 — Success

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Farm Worker Needed",
    "description": "Looking for experienced farm workers in Jaffna district",
    "district": "Jaffna",
    "town": "Chavakachcheri",
    "category": "Agriculture",
    "jobType": "FULL_TIME",
    "salaryMin": 30000,
    "salaryMax": 50000,
    "contactPhone": "0771234567",
    "location": {
        "type": "Point",
        "coordinates": [80.0255, 9.6628]
    }
}

request.description: Post a new job. Requires employer token. Location field is optional — coordinates format is [longitude, latitude]. Job ID is auto-saved.
Update your own job. Requires employer token. Send only the fields you want to change.

response.name: 200 — Updated
403 — Not your job

request.description: Delete a job. Allowed for the job owner (employer) or an admin.

item.name: Companies
item.description: Company profile management. Each employer can have one company. Public users can view profiles by ID.

body.raw:
{
    "businessName": "Kumar Textiles Pvt Ltd",
    "description": "Textile manufacturing company based in Jaffna",
    "district": "Jaffna",
    "town": "Nallur",
    "contactPhone": "0771234567",
    "contactWhatsApp": "0771234567"
}

request.description: Create a company profile. Requires employer token. One company per employer. Starts as PENDING until admin verifies. Company ID is auto-saved.

response.name: 201 — Created

request.description: Get your own company profile with full details. Requires employer token.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Update your company details. Requires employer token. Send only changed fields.

response.name: 200 — Updated

request.description: View a company's public profile. No auth required.

response.name: 200 — Success

item.name: Applications
item.description: Job application flow. Job seekers apply, employers review and update status. Status flow: APPLIED > REVIEWED > ACCEPTED / REJECTED.

request.description: Submit a job application. Requires job seeker token. Duplicate applications are blocked. Application ID is auto-saved.

response.name: 409 — Already applied

request.description: Get all applications submitted by the current job seeker. Requires job seeker token.
View all applicants for a specific job. Requires employer token. Only the job owner can access.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Update application status. Requires employer token (job owner only). Valid statuses: APPLIED, REVIEWED, ACCEPTED, REJECTED. Note is optional.

response.name: 200 — Updated

request.description: Withdraw your application. Requires job seeker token. Only the applicant can withdraw their own application.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Platform management endpoints. All routes require admin token. Login with admin credentials first (admin@example.com / Admin@123).

request.description: List all registered users. Passwords are excluded.
Activate or suspend a user. Valid values: ACTIVE, SUSPENDED.
List all jobs with employer details populated.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Delete any job by ID.
List all applications with job, seeker, and employer details.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Delete any application by ID.
Mark a company as verified. Changes status from PENDING to VERIFIED.

response.name: 200 — Verified

request.description: Suspend a company. Sets isSuspended to true.

response.name: 200 — Suspended

item.name: Geo
item.description: Geolocation services using OpenStreetMap. Convert place names to coordinates. No auth required.

request.description: Convert a district or place name to latitude and longitude coordinates.
